name: NASA Near-Earth Objects In The Coming Week
description: Monitor near-Earth asteroids approaching Earth. View closest approaches, largest objects, fastest speeds, and detailed asteroid information.
author: Miyagi Team

inputs.name: startDate
inputs.label: Start Date
inputs.description: Start date for fetching near-Earth objects (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today.

inputs.name: endDate
inputs.label: End Date
inputs.description: End date for fetching near-Earth objects (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 7 days after start date.
